title: RAG-Gym: A Framework for Process Supervision in Autonomous Search Agents

defines.name: RAG-Gym
defines.definition: A framework that formulates agentic search as an MDP and shifts supervision from final answers to intermediate search processes.

defines.name: Re2Search++
defines.definition: A process-supervised search agent built on RAG-Gym and Re2Search that improves multi-hop information-seeking performance.

problem: Outcome-supervised search agents are prone to reward hacking, over-rely on parametric memory, and generalize poorly to out-of-domain information-seeking tasks.
